summary: Six military vehicles assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence levels, all exhibiting catastrophic structural damage including melted hulls, fragmented turrets, and exposed internal components consistent with K-kill destruction. The functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for all assessed targets, rendering them non-functional and strategically irrelevant.
